lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਪੂਛਿ ਨ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa paatisaahu poochh na kare beechaar |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True King does not seek advice from anyone else in His decisions. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸੋਈ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਸੀ ਹੋਰੁ ਆਖਣੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hukam soee tudh bhaavasee hor aakhan bahut apaar |
lines.english: The Hukam of Your Command is the pleasure of Your Will, Lord. To say anything else is far beyond anyone's reach.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਸੁਤੈ ਤਨੁ ਪੀੜੀਐ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਚਲਹਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥੪॥੭॥
lines.translit: jit sutai tan peerreeai man meh chaleh vikaar |1| rahaau |4|7|
lines.english: By such sleep, the body is ruined, and wickedness and corruption enter into the mind. ||1||Pause||4||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਹੋਰੁ ਸਉਣਾ ਖੁਸੀ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa hor saunaa khusee khuaar |
lines.english: O Baba, the pleasure of other sleep is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਕਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਟਿਕਾ ਤਿਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਮਤਿ ਵਿਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath kaa mukh ttikaa tith ghatt mat vigaas |
lines.english: with the face anointed at the sixty-eight holy places of pilgrimage, and the heart illuminated with wisdom

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁੰਗੂ ਕੀ ਕਾਂਇਆ ਰਤਨਾ ਕੀ ਲਲਿਤਾ ਅਗਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਤਨਿ ਸਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: kungoo kee kaaneaa ratanaa kee lalitaa agar vaas tan saas |
lines.english: With the body of saffron, and the tongue a jewel, and the breath of the body pure fragrant incense;

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਤੁ ਮਤੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ot matee saalaahanaa sach naam gunataas |1|
lines.english: -with that wisdom, chant the Praises of the True Name, the Treasure of Excellence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਹੋਰ ਮਤਿ ਹੋਰ ਹੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa hor mat hor hor |
lines.english: O Baba, other wisdom is useless and irrelevant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਵੇਰ ਕਮਾਈਐ ਕੂੜੈ ਕੂੜਾ ਜੋਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: je sau ver kamaaeeai koorrai koorraa jor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If falsehood is practiced a hundred times, it is still false in its effects. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜ ਲਗੈ ਪੀਰੁ ਆਖੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: pooj lagai peer aakheeai sabh milai sansaar |
lines.english: You may be worshipped and adored as a Pir (a spiritual teacher); you may be welcomed by all the world;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਪਤਿ ਲੇਖੈ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਸਭਾ ਪੂਜ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaa pat lekhai naa pavai sabhaa pooj khuaar |2|
lines.english: -even so, if you are not accepted in the Court of the Lord, then all this adoration is false. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਸਦਾਏ ਆਪਣਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਿਧੁ ਸੁਮਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naau sadaae aapanaa hovai sidh sumaar |
lines.english: you may adopt a lofty name, and be known to have supernatural spiritual powers

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਥਾਪਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਮੇਟਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau satigur thaapiaa tin mett na sakai koe |
lines.english: No one can overthrow those who have been established by the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਪੂਜੀਐ ਨਾਉ ਮੰਨੀਐ ਅਖੰਡੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naau poojeeai naau maneeai akhandd sadaa sach soe |3|
lines.english: They worship the Naam, and they believe in the Naam. The True One is forever Intact and Unbroken. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮੋ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: onaa andar naam nidhaan hai naamo paragatt hoe |
lines.english: The Treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is within them, and through the Naam, they are radiant and famous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਹੂ ਖੇਹ ਰਲਾਈਐ ਤਾ ਜੀਉ ਕੇਹਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: khehoo kheh ralaaeeai taa jeeo kehaa hoe |
lines.english: When the body mingles with dust, what happens to the soul?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲੀਆ ਸਭਿ ਸਿਆਣਪਾ ਉਠੀ ਚਲਿਆ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaleea sabh siaanapaa utthee chaliaa roe |
lines.english: All clever tricks are burnt away, and you shall depart crying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਐ ਦਰਿ ਗਇਆ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naam visaariai dar geaa kiaa hoe |4|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who forget the Naam-what will happen when they go to the Court of the Lord? ||4||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਲੋੜਹਿ ਵਰੁ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਨਹ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਪਿਰ ਕੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: je lorreh var kaamanee neh mileeai pir koor |
lines.english: If you long for your Husband Lord, O soul-bride, you must know that He is not met by falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਬੇੜੀ ਨਾ ਤੁਲਹੜਾ ਨਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਪਿਰੁ ਦੂਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naa berree naa tulaharraa naa paaeeai pir door |1|
lines.english: No boat or raft can take you to Him. Your Husband Lord is far away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਗੁਣ ਵੀਥਰੈ ਅਉਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਝੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gunavantee gun veetharai aaugunavantee jhoor |
lines.english: The virtuous wife exudes virtue; the unvirtuous suffer in misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਪੂਰੈ ਤਖਤਿ ਅਡੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere tthaakur poorai takhat addol |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is Perfect; His Throne is Eternal and Immovable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਜੇ ਕਰੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਾਚੁ ਅਤੋਲੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh pooraa je kare paaeeai saach atol |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who attains perfection as Gurmukh, obtains the Immeasurable True Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹਰਿਮੰਦਰੁ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਹਿ ਮਾਣਕ ਲਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: prabh harimandar sohanaa tis meh maanak laal |
lines.english: The Palace of the Lord God is so beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਤੀ ਹੀਰਾ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਕੰਚਨ ਕੋਟ ਰੀਸਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: motee heeraa niramalaa kanchan kott reesaal |
lines.english: Within it, there are gems, rubies, pearls and flawless diamonds. A fortress of gold surrounds this Source of Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਪਉੜੀ ਗੜਿ ਕਿਉ ਚੜਉ ਗੁਰ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਨ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin paurree garr kiau chrrau gur har dhiaan nihaal |2|
lines.english: How can I climb up to the Fortress without a ladder? By meditating on the Lord, through the Guru, I am blessed and exalted. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪਉੜੀ ਬੇੜੀ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਲਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur paurree berree guroo gur tulahaa har naau |
lines.english: The Guru is the Ladder, the Guru is the Boat, and the Guru is the Raft to take me to the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਊਜਲੀ ਸਤ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਵਣ ਜਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: je tis bhaavai aoojalee sat sar naavan jaau |3|
lines.english: If it pleases Him, I bathe in the Pool of Truth, and become radiant and pure. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਬੋਹਿਥੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਦਰੀਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur sar saagar bohitho gur teerath dareeaau |
lines.english: The Guru is the Boat to carry me across the world-ocean; the Guru is the Sacred Shrine of Pilgrimage, the Guru is the Holy River.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਥਾਨਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੈ ਪੂਰੈ ਆਸ ਨਿਰਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: poorai thaan suhaavanai poorai aas niraas |
lines.english: He looks so Beautiful in His Perfect Place. He fulfills the hopes of the hopeless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੋ ਪੂਰੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਪੂਰੈ ਤਖਤਿ ਨਿਵਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: pooro pooro aakheeai poorai takhat nivaas |
lines.english: He is called the Most Perfect of the Perfect. He sits upon His Perfect Throne.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਭੈਣੇ ਗਲਿ ਮਿਲਹ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਹੇਲੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu bhaine gal milah ank sahelarreeaah |
lines.english: Come, my dear sisters and spiritual companions; hug me close in your embrace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਾ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਕਿਉ ਘਾਟੈ ਗੁਣ ਤਾਸ ॥੪॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak pooraa je milai kiau ghaattai gun taas |4|9|
lines.english: O Nanak, if one obtains the Perfect Lord, how can his virtues decrease? ||4||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਕੈ ਕਰਹ ਕਹਾਣੀਆ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਥ ਕੰਤ ਕੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: mil kai karah kahaaneea samrath kant keeaah |
lines.english: Let's join together, and tell stories of our All-powerful Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਸਭਿ ਗੁਣ ਅਉਗਣ ਸਭਿ ਅਸਾਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saache saahib sabh gun aaugan sabh asaah |1|
lines.english: All Virtues are in our True Lord and Master; we are utterly without virtue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਜਾ ਤੂ ਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ek sabad beechaareeai jaa too taa kiaa hor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I dwell upon the One Word of the Shabad. You are mine-what else do I need? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਤੇਰੈ ਜੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: karataa sabh ko terai jor |
lines.english: O Creator Lord, all are in Your Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੀਆ ਮਿਠਾ ਬੋਲਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj santokh seegaareea mitthaa bolanee |
lines.english: "We are adorned with intuitive ease, contentment and sweet words.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਰੀਸਾਲੂ ਤਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਾ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pir reesaaloo taa milai jaa gur kaa sabad sunee |2|
lines.english: We meet with our Beloved, the Source of Joy, when we listen to the Word of the Guru's Shabad." ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਇ ਪੁਛਹੁ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਤੁਸੀ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਕਿਨੀ ਗੁਣਂ‍ੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaae puchhahu sohaaganee tusee raaviaa kinee gunanee |
lines.english: Go, and ask the happy soul-brides, "By what virtuous qualities do you enjoy your Husband Lord?"
